title: Axes Are Better
description: This mod adds new features to make axes now weapons with all sword enchants, and including 6 new ones for the axe as well. AXES ARE BETTER!
body:
Welcome to the **Axes Are Better** Mod! This mod adds every sword enchant to be compatible with the axe, and also adds 6 new enchants for the axe as well, and also makes axes actually weapons now also.

**--Main Features--**

- Axes can now accept all sword enchantments (Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, Fire Aspect, Looting, Knockback, Sweeping Edge)
- Axes are treated as full melee weapons, added to the melee weapon and sweeping enchantable item tags

**--Breaching--**

- Deals damage through shields and damages them more, with an extended stun cooldown
- Has 4 levels to it, each level increases shield bypass damage and stun duration

**--Final Blow--**

- Deals 3x damage to mobs at 10% health or less, like an executioner's strike
- Has 1 level to it

**--Timber--**

- Sneaking while chopping a log breaks the entire tree at once
- Consumes 5x durability per extra log broken
- Has 1 level to it

**--Sunder--**

- Attacks permanently reduce a mob's armor attribute by 5% per hit per level, stacking up to 25%
- Has 5 levels to it, Level 1: 5% per hit, Level 2: 10%, Level 3: 15%, Level 4: 20%, Level 5: 25%

**--Dense--**

- While holding the axe, you take less knockback from mobs
- Has 4 levels to it, Level 1: 5%, Level 2: 10%, Level 3: 15%, Level 4: 20% knockback reduction

**--Whirlwind--**

- Hold right click to charge a whirlwind attack, or a spin attack, on release, it knockbacks and damages all nearby mobs with a custom particle effect
- Has 3 levels to it, Level 1: 4 damage / 3 block radius, Level 2: 6 damage / 3.75 block radius, Level 3: 8 damage / 4.5 block radius

This mod supports enchanting table and villagers also.

**Made by MaceMeta**
